news.t: NEOS Investments Announces May 2026 ETF Suite Distributions
NEOS Investments Launches Boosted High Income ETF Suite

holdings.infoBox: XQQI is an equity ETF with a total of 108 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.13%, Apple at 6.85%, Micron Technology at 5.33%, Microsoft at 4.66%, and Amazon.com at 4.16%.

overview.description: The NEOS Boosted Nasdaq-100 High Income ETF (XQQI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund aims for tax-efficient and high monthly income by actively investing in stocks and options on the NASDAQ-100 Index. The fund employs call spread and covered call strategies to enhance income. XQQI was launched on Jan 29, 2026 and is issued by Neos.
